message:
chore: audit batch 396 (10 files, ~12,852L, 0 bugs)

- web_grpc_reference_services.rs (1311L): REST+gRPC lifecycle

- fs_verification.rs (1261L): async filesystem ops
- lean_proof_impact_closed_loop_report.rs (1252L): report schema
- integration_e2e.rs (1242L): combinator composition E2E
- tokio_io_codec_cancellation_correctness.rs (1321L): cancel-safe I/O
- web_grpc_exhaustive_unit.rs (1316L): 41 unit tests
All SOUND, 0 bugs found.
